title: Decor & More
body:
Decoration blocks, for inside structures and out, that look like they could fit right in with vanilla.

## Includes
- stair-shaped and half-block-shaped log benches, for all non-stripped log types
- slab-like dyeable cushioned wooden stools, including planks and log versions.  Craft with colored wool or click on with a dye to change the color of the top of the stool!
- new metal lanterns to complement the vanilla lantern—includes gold, netherite, and all copper stages!
- new redstone-powered lantern—also in gold, netherite, and copper versions!
- new redstone chain that allows you to pass a redstone signal vertically to redstone powered lanterns (see above)
- table blocks out of various materials that combine will with existing slab blocks

_This mod is still in development, so more features coming soon!_

# FAQ
**Fabric/Quilt/etc.?**

No, sorry.

**Other versions? / Why only 1.18.2?**

TBD. This isn't my main project, so updates, of any kind, are sporadic. I chose to make this for 1.18.2 because that's what my main project ([Celestial Exploration](https://modrinth.com/mod/celestial-exploration)) is currently on.

**Compatibility with other mods that add other wood types? I.e. BOP or BYG?**

…I'd like to, but we'll see. If I do that, it'll probably be via addon(s), just like I did with [Super Secret Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/super-secret-doors).
